query:
SELECT 'blocos' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM competencias_blocos
UNION ALL
SELECT 'macros' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM competencias_macros
UNION ALL
SELECT 'micros' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM competencias_micros;
